title: tessenia racemosa
intro: Tessenia racemosa, also known as the fragrant fern or sweet fern, is a type of plant native to the eastern regions of North America, characterized by its unique, fragrant foliage. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tessenia racemosa include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
